sourceTitle: Haggadah or Home Service for the Festival of Passover

modules.exactText: They were made slaves, to labor without hope of reward, to toil without opportunity for rest.

locator.edition: Haggadah or Home Service for the Festival of Passover

attribution.readerCredit: From Haggadah or Home Service for the Festival of Passover by J. Leonard Levy.

modules.exactText: May we employ our days on earth wisely, devoting ourselves to all causes that tend to better the conditions of our fellow-men. Loving one another, aiding one another, and trusting faithfully in Thee, may we peacefully spend our allotted days on earth and look forward fearlessly to the eternal beyond.
